calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-28-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. Mr. Tsange stated the case is settled and requested a continuance for the court to retain jurisdiction. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 28, 2026 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2022 Continued To Jan-10-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
